requirement_topic.en: Explosive Atmosphere (ATEX) Equipment Certification for Hydrogen Electrolyzers
requirement_topic.zh: 氢电解槽爆炸性环境（ATEX）设备认证
requirement_topic.zht: 氫電解槽爆炸性環境（ATEX）設備認證

summary.en: Equipment and protective systems intended for use in potentially explosive atmospheres (including hydrogen gas zones) must comply with ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU. Hydrogen electrolyzer electrical components in or adjacent to hydrogen-producing zones must be classified and certified under the appropriate equipment category (e.g., Category 1G or 2G for gas/vapour explosive atmospheres). Conformity assessment for Categories 1 and 2 requires involvement of an EU Notified Body; Category 3 allows manufacturer self-declaration. Harmonised standards such as the EN IEC 60079 series (Explosive Atmospheres) are voluntary technical routes that may confer a presumption of conformity with ATEX essential health and safety requirements; alternative evidence is allowed.
summary.zh: 用于潜在爆炸性环境（包括氢气区）的设备和保护系统须符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU。氢电解槽在氢气产生区域内或附近的电气部件，须按适当设备类别（如气体/蒸气爆炸性环境的1G或2G类）进行分类和认证。第1、2类合格评定需欧盟公告机构参与；第3类允许制造商自行声明。EN IEC 60079系列（爆炸性环境）等协调标准属于自愿性技术路径，可对ATEX基本健康与安全要求产生符合性推定；也可采用其他证明材料。
summary.zht: 用於潛在爆炸性環境（包括氫氣區）的設備和保護系統須符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU。氫電解槽在氫氣產生區域內或附近的電氣部件，須按適當設備類別（如氣體/蒸氣爆炸性環境的1G或2G類）進行分類和認證。第1、2類合格評定需歐盟公告機構參與；第3類允許製造商自行聲明。EN IEC 60079系列（爆炸性環境）等協調標準屬於自願性技術路徑，可對ATEX基本健康與安全要求產生符合性推定；也可採用其他證明材料。

standards_or_laws: EN 1127-1 (Explosive atmospheres — Basic concepts and methodology)

summary.en: China requires Ex certification under the GB 3836 series (Electrical apparatus for explosive gas atmospheres), administered by CESI or other CNEX-accredited bodies. The GB 3836 series is technically aligned with IEC 60079 but constitutes a separate national certification regime. Products must obtain a Chinese Ex certificate and explosion-proof mark before sale or use in China. GB/T 3836.1 covers general requirements; subsequent parts mirror IEC 60079 sub-series for specific protection methods.
summary.zh: 中国要求依据GB 3836系列（爆炸性气体环境用电气设备）进行Ex认证，由CESI或其他CNEX认可机构负责。GB 3836系列在技术上与IEC 60079对标，但构成独立的国家认证体系。产品在中国境内销售或使用前须取得中国Ex证书及防爆标志。GB/T 3836.1涵盖通用要求；后续各部分对应IEC 60079子系列的各种防护方式。
summary.zht: 中國要求依據GB 3836系列（爆炸性氣體環境用電氣設備）進行Ex認證，由CESI或其他CNEX認可機構負責。GB 3836系列在技術上與IEC 60079對標，但構成獨立的國家認證體系。產品在中國境內銷售或使用前須取得中國Ex證書及防爆標誌。GB/T 3836.1涵蓋通用要求；後續各部分對應IEC 60079子系列的各種防護方式。

standards_or_laws: GB 3836.1-2021 (爆炸性环境 第1部分：设备 通用要求)
GB/T 3836 series (additional parts mirroring IEC 60079 sub-series)

gap.en: Chinese GB 3836 Ex certificates issued by CNEX-accredited bodies are NOT accepted in the EU. For EU market entry, a separate ATEX conformity assessment under 2014/34/EU is mandatory for equipment in scope, including EU-type examination by a Notified Body for Category 1 and 2 equipment. The CE marking (ATEX) and EU Declaration of Conformity must be obtained. EN IEC 60079 standards may support presumption of conformity but are not the mandatory or sole route. Hydrogen electrolyzer manufacturers holding only Chinese Ex marks must complete the applicable ATEX assessment and affix the specific ATEX Ex marking (including notified body number for categories 1 and 2) before placing equipment on the EU market.
gap.zh: CNEX认可机构颁发的中国GB 3836 Ex证书在欧盟不被接受。进入欧盟市场，范围内设备须依据2014/34/EU进行独立ATEX合格评定，第1、2类设备还需公告机构进行EU型式检验。须取得CE标志（ATEX）及欧盟符合性声明。EN IEC 60079标准可支持符合性推定，但并非强制或唯一路径。仅持有中国防爆标志的氢电解槽制造商，须完成适用的ATEX评定，并在将设备投放欧盟市场前加贴特定ATEX Ex标志（第1、2类须含公告机构编号）。
gap.zht: CNEX認可機構頒發的中國GB 3836 Ex證書在歐盟不被接受。進入歐盟市場，範圍內設備須依據2014/34/EU進行獨立ATEX合格評定，第1、2類設備還需公告機構進行EU型式檢驗。須取得CE標誌（ATEX）及歐盟符合性聲明。EN IEC 60079標準可支持符合性推定，但並非強制或唯一路徑。僅持有中國防爆標誌的氫電解槽製造商，須完成適用的ATEX評定，並在將設備投放歐盟市場前加貼特定ATEX Ex標誌（第1、2類須含公告機構編號）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU conformity and ATEX CE marking for equipment in scope placed on the EU market, with Notified Body involvement for Category 1 and 2 equipment. EN IEC 60079 / EN 1127-1 are voluntary harmonised standards that may confer presumption of conformity; alternatives are allowed with evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CN) — GB 3836 Ex certification required for explosive-atmosphere equipment in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Equipment for use in hydrogen explosive-atmosphere zones entering the EU market must carry ATEX CE marking under Directive 2014/34/EU. EN IEC 60079 series standards can support presumption of conformity but are voluntary and not exclusive. Chinese GB 3836 Ex certification is a parallel national regime and is not mutually recognised. A separate EU Notified Body assessment is required for Category 1 and 2 equipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入欧盟市场的氢气爆炸性环境区域用设备，须依据指令2014/34/EU加贴ATEX CE标志。EN IEC 60079系列标准可支持符合性推定，但属于自愿性且并非唯一路径。中国GB 3836防爆认证为独立的国家体系，双方不存在互认安排。第1、2类设备须另行委托欧盟公告机构评定。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入歐盟市場的氫氣爆炸性環境區域用設備，須依據指令2014/34/EU加貼ATEX CE標誌。EN IEC 60079系列標準可支持符合性推定，但屬於自願性且並非唯一路徑。中國GB 3836防爆認證為獨立的國家體系，雙方不存在互認安排。第1、2類設備須另行委託歐盟公告機構評定。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律意見。

requirement_topic.en: Machinery Safety Directive (CE) for Hydrogen Electrolyzers
requirement_topic.zh: 氢电解槽机械指令（CE）安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 氫電解槽機械指令（CE）安全要求

summary.en: Water electrolyzers constitute machinery under the EU Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC (replaced by Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 from 20 January 2027). Manufacturers must conduct a risk assessment covering mechanical, electrical, and hydrogen-specific hazards; prepare a technical file; issue an EU Declaration of Conformity; and affix CE marking before placing the product on the EU market. Harmonised standards, including EN ISO 22734 for hydrogen generators, are voluntary routes that may confer a presumption of conformity for covered EHSRs; alternatives are allowed if conformity is demonstrated. Electrical risks of the complete machine are addressed by the Machinery Directive / Regulation Essential Health and Safety Requirements (EHSRs); the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) applies only where a product or sub-assembly is independently within LVD scope (not simply because it contains electrical parts covered by the Machinery EHSRs). The EMC Directive 2014/30/EU applies to electrical/electronic sub-assemblies within its scope.
summary.zh: 水电解槽属于欧盟机械指令2006/42/EC（自2027年1月20日起由机械法规（EU）2023/1230取代）项下的机械。制造商须就机械、电气及氢气特定危害进行风险评估；编制技术文件；签发欧盟符合性声明；并在将产品投放欧盟市场前加贴CE标志。包括氢气发生器EN ISO 22734在内的协调标准属于自愿性路径，可对其覆盖的EHSR产生符合性推定；如能证明符合指令要求，也可采用其他方案。整机的电气风险由机械指令/法规基本健康与安全要求（EHSR）覆盖；低电压指令2014/35/EU（LVD）仅适用于独立属于LVD范围的产品或子组件，而非仅因含有受机械EHSR覆盖的电气部件即自动适用。电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU适用于其范围内的电气/电子子组件。
summary.zht: 水電解槽屬於歐盟機械指令2006/42/EC（自2027年1月20日起由機械法規（EU）2023/1230取代）項下的機械。製造商須就機械、電氣及氫氣特定危害進行風險評估；編製技術文件；簽發歐盟符合性聲明；並在將產品投放歐盟市場前加貼CE標誌。包括氫氣發生器EN ISO 22734在內的協調標準屬於自願性路徑，可對其覆蓋的EHSR產生符合性推定；如能證明符合指令要求，也可採用其他方案。整機的電氣風險由機械指令/法規基本健康與安全要求（EHSR）覆蓋；低電壓指令2014/35/EU（LVD）僅適用於獨立屬於LVD範圍的產品或子組件，而非僅因含有受機械EHSR覆蓋的電氣部件即自動適用。電磁相容指令2014/30/EU適用於其範圍內的電氣/電子子組件。

standards_or_laws: Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (applies where product/sub-assembly is independently within LVD scope)

EN ISO 22734:2019 (Hydrogen generators using water electrolysis — Industrial, commercial and residential applications; superseded at ISO level by ISO 22734-1:2025 Part 1: Safety, July 2025; EN ISO 22734-1:2025 not yet published in EU Official Journal as harmonised standard as of mid-2026)
EN ISO 13849-1 (Safety of machinery — Safety-related parts of control systems)

summary.en: China does not have a single direct equivalent to the EU Machinery Directive for electrolyzers. Relevant national requirements include GB standards for pressure vessels (GB 150 series, supervised by SAMR/TSB for special equipment licensing), electrical safety standards (GB 4706 series for household appliances; GB/T standards for industrial equipment), and EMC standards (GB/T 17626 series). Hydrogen-generating equipment may also be subject to special equipment (特种设备) registration under the Special Equipment Safety Law. Industrial water electrolyzers do not appear in the current CCC mandatory product catalogue per CNCA announcements through 2025; CCC applies only to product categories expressly listed.
summary.zh: 中国没有针对电解槽的单一直接对应欧盟机械指令的法规。相关国家要求包括：压力容器GB标准（GB 150系列，由市场监管总局/特种设备局监管特种设备许可）、电气安全标准（GB 4706系列适用于家用电器；工业设备适用GB/T标准）及电磁兼容标准（GB/T 17626系列）。制氢设备还可能须依据《特种设备安全法》进行特种设备注册。根据CNCA截至2025年的公告，工业水电解槽不在现行CCC强制认证产品目录范围内；CCC仅适用于目录明确列举的产品类别。
summary.zht: 中國沒有針對電解槽的單一直接對應歐盟機械指令的法規。相關國家要求包括：壓力容器GB標準（GB 150系列，由市場監管總局/特種設備局監管特種設備許可）、電氣安全標準（GB 4706系列適用於家用電器；工業設備適用GB/T標準）及電磁相容標準（GB/T 17626系列）。制氫設備還可能須依據《特種設備安全法》進行特種設備註冊。根據CNCA截至2025年的公告，工業水電解槽不在現行CCC強制認證產品目錄範圍內；CCC僅適用於目錄明確列舉的產品類別。

standards_or_laws: Special Equipment Safety Law (特种设备安全法) 2013
GB/T 37563-2019 (质子交换膜燃料电池发电系统安全要求 — adjacent reference)
GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, IEC 60950/62368 equivalent) — applies to IT and audio/video equipment; does not apply to industrial electrolyzer systems as complete units

gap.en: China lacks a unified machinery CE-equivalent certification pathway. For EU market entry, manufacturers must demonstrate conformity and affix CE marking under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC (or successor Regulation 2023/1230 once effective), LVD 2014/35/EU (where sub-assemblies are independently within LVD scope), and EMC Directive 2014/30/EU as applicable. Chinese national certifications (GB standards, special equipment licences) and any voluntary CCC marks do not substitute for EU CE marking. Manufacturers must compile an EU-format technical file and perform an EU-compliant risk assessment; EN ISO 12100 and EN ISO 22734 may support presumption of conformity where harmonised and applicable, but they are not mandatory or exclusive. Certain machinery categories may need a Notified Body.
gap.zh: 中国缺乏统一的机械CE等效认证路径。进入欧盟市场，制造商须证明符合机械指令2006/42/EC（或2023/1230法规生效后的后续法规）、低电压指令2014/35/EU（适用于独立属于LVD范围的子组件）及电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（视适用情况），并加贴CE标志。中国国家认证（GB标准、特种设备许可）及任何自愿性CCC标志均不能替代欧盟CE标志。制造商须编制欧盟格式技术文件，并进行符合欧盟要求的风险评估；EN ISO 12100和EN ISO 22734在已协调且适用时可支持符合性推定，但并非强制或唯一路径。特定机械类别可能还需公告机构介入。
gap.zht: 中國缺乏統一的機械CE等效認證路徑。進入歐盟市場，製造商須證明符合機械指令2006/42/EC（或2023/1230法規生效後的後續法規）、低電壓指令2014/35/EU（適用於獨立屬於LVD範圍的子組件）及電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（視適用情況），並加貼CE標誌。中國國家認證（GB標準、特種設備許可）及任何自願性CCC標誌均不能替代歐盟CE標誌。製造商須編製歐盟格式技術文件，並進行符合歐盟要求的風險評估；EN ISO 12100和EN ISO 22734在已協調且適用時可支持符合性推定，但並非強制或唯一路徑。特定機械類別可能還需公告機構介入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking and conformity under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC / Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 when applicable, plus LVD 2014/35/EU and EMC 2014/30/EU where in scope. EN ISO 22734 / EN ISO 13849-1 are voluntary harmonised standards that may confer presumption of conformity; alternatives are allowed with evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CN) — Special equipment licensing (SAMR) required for pressure-bearing electrolyzer vessels; industrial water electrolyzers as complete units not in current CCC mandatory catalogue per CNCA announcements through 2025

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Hydrogen water electrolyzers sold in the EU must carry CE marking under the Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC or, from 20 January 2027, Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230; LVD 2014/35/EU and EMC Directive 2014/30/EU apply where independently in scope. EN ISO 22734 can support presumption of conformity but is voluntary and not exclusive. Chinese GB-based certifications and special equipment licences do not fulfil EU CE marking obligations. Where the electrolyzer also operates in an explosive atmosphere zone, ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU compliance (see row eleceu-atex-explosive-atmosphere) is additionally required. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在欧盟销售的氢气水电解槽须依据机械指令2006/42/EC（或自2027年1月20日起的机械法规（EU）2023/1230）加贴CE标志；低电压指令2014/35/EU及电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU在独立属于其范围时适用。EN ISO 22734可支持符合性推定，但属于自愿性且并非唯一路径。中国GB认证及特种设备许可不能履行欧盟CE标志义务。若电解槽同时在爆炸性环境区域运行，还须额外符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU（见条目eleceu-atex-explosive-atmosphere）。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律意见。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在歐盟銷售的氫氣水電解槽須依據機械指令2006/42/EC（或自2027年1月20日起的機械法規（EU）2023/1230）加貼CE標誌；低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電磁相容指令2014/30/EU在獨立屬於其範圍時適用。EN ISO 22734可支持符合性推定，但屬於自願性且並非唯一路徑。中國GB認證及特種設備許可不能履行歐盟CE標誌義務。若電解槽同時在爆炸性環境區域運行，還須額外符合ATEX指令2014/34/EU（見條目eleceu-atex-explosive-atmosphere）。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律意見。
